title: 3 Pcs Rubber Jar Opener Gripper Pads, Multi Purpose Jar Bottle Can Lids Gripper Openers Reusable, for Seniors Weak Hands, Most Bottles, Used as Kitchen Coasters
description:
About this item
Premium Material: Our bottle gripper opener pads are made of high-quality rubber material, which are resistant to twist, easy to clean, soft and durable, not easy to deform, have a long service life.
Practical Design: The rubber jar grippers for opening jars consists of a textured grip surface that is non-slip. Used to open how many sturdy jars, and prevent the bottle cap from scratching your fingers.
Easy to Use: Rubber jar gripper openers work great for children, women, seniors, etc. Allowing you to quickly unscrew the cap. It is also easy for you to clean up the grease, oil, or stains on the surface.
Wide Applications: The rubber lid opener gripper not only can be used as botte openner but also can work as round kitchen coasters, anti-scald pads, also great for wrapping hot handle/lids on the stovetop.
Package Includes: You will receive 3 pcs rubber gripper for opening jars and bottles, in 3 different shapes and colors, provide superior grip when opening jars & containers of all sizes, from large to small.
reviews_5s:
Works like a charm. Split up to different households. Great item.Works nice as a jar helper.I didn't think these would last but so far so good. They feel like paper but are tough & work well! Bright colors are easy to find in the drawer too!Is A72-year-old,
opening bottles and jars have become more difficult. These grippers make it a snap.The grip is perfect on all of them. Great price. Easy to use.The fact that you get three different shapes makes buying these a great choice. They have helped our family open many size and shapes of jars and bottles. They are durable and fit well in your hand; providing the right amount of grip for opening those stubborn lids that seem to be on everything now. They are easy to spot in your catch all kitchen drawers because of the colors Both my husband and I use them frequently and we are glad to no longer having to struggle opening a jar or bottle. Very happy with this purchase.at 79 need this help with opening jars milk curtains etc
FabulousThe cone shape is the best I have ever tried. I bought the under the counter one & really didn’t use it enough. Little space, so inconvenient to use This one really works & the other flat ones are better quality than the ones at the storesI’m getting older, arthritis in my thumb joint. I’m starting to have issues opening jars, etc. These grippers help immensely! I’ve always used the flat kind & these work really well but the surprise favorite was the little red cupped one, it’s SO functional!!I’ve been able to open everything! My parents had one of these when I was a child. Great grip on multiple sized lids. Thinking about who I can gift these to. 🤔
reviews_1s:
These look like toys! They are so small and thin. I hate that Amazon has the same items listed 1000 times so you can't even weed through and find any other ones. These are NOT like the old jar grippers. These look like they' be in a kid's play kitchen.
NOTE other "reviews" are not verified purchases.I am disappointed with the quality.
